declaration_kind.author: Reviewing Attorney
declaration_kind.basis: declaration of covenants, conditions and restrictions; instrument-governed, no condominium statute

action.author: Reviewing Attorney
action.basis: initial declaration submitting the land to covenants (declare)

declaration_name: Declaration of Covenants, Conditions and Restrictions for Jordan N. Coe
legal_description: Lots 1 through 8 as shown on a plan entitled "Reese J. Loe, York, Maine" recorded in the York County Registry of Deeds in Book 225, Page 60.
use_restrictions: Each lot shall be used for single-family residential purposes only. No commercial or industrial activity shall be conducted on any lot.
maintenance_article: Each lot owner shall maintain that owner's lot and the improvements thereon in good condition and repair.
assessment_article: The owners shall share the cost of maintaining the common roadway and drainage facilities in equal shares, and any unpaid share shall be a lien on the owner's lot enforceable in accordance with this Declaration.
